default.title: CEFA – Plastic Injection Moulding for Automotive OEMs | Spain
default.description: Tier 1 automotive plastic manufacturer since 1946. Dashboards, door panels and exterior trims for OEMs. IATF 16949 & ISO 9001 certified. Zaragoza, Spain.
